title: VEHICLE CERTIFICATE OF TITLE LAW
doc_html:
CHAPTER 4.  VEHICLE CERTIFICATE OF TITLE LAW

§701.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and designated as the Vehicle Certificate of Title Law.

Acts 1950, No. 342, §1.
